chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5768 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing on CMA No.24273/2021 3. For hearing of main case 27.02.2025 Mr. Altamash Arab, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondent Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, advocate for respondent Mr. Zohaib advocate for respondent No.6 Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General This petition is pending since 2021. The primary prayer clause discloses that it assails an order in appeal rendered in the customs hierarchy. While the petitioner remained at liberty to seek redressal of his grievance within the statutory hierarchy no case is made out to justify direct recourse to writ jurisdiction. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
